title: UI Enhancement Prompt Pack
description: Reusable UX and frontend prompts for interface audits, optimization passes, and implementation planning.
author: Dave

presets.title: Navigation Simplification
presets.summary: Reduce navigation complexity to 4-6 items grouped by user intent.
useCases: Redundant paths to the same content

inputs.label: Target Surface
inputs.placeholder: CurlPlan top nav, Garden OS sidebar

inputs.label: Current Navigation Items
inputs.placeholder: List current nav items and their destinations

presets.prompt:
You are an information architect.

TASK:
Reduce navigation complexity and cognitive load for: {{target_surface}}.

CURRENT NAVIGATION:
{{current_nav}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Limit top-level navigation to 4–6 items
- Group by user intent, not system structure
- Remove redundant paths
- Use contextual navigation where possible
- Add clear backtracking

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. New Navigation Structure
2. Removed / Merged Elements
3. Core User Flows

presets.title: CTA Clarity Optimization
presets.summary: Enforce one primary action per screen and rewrite vague labels to outcome-based labels.
useCases: Vague labels like Submit or OK

inputs.label: Target Surface
inputs.placeholder: Planner view, editor panel, quote form

inputs.label: Current Actions / Buttons
inputs.placeholder: List all buttons and actions currently visible on the screen

presets.prompt:
You are a product UX strategist.

TASK:
Maximize action clarity and reduce hesitation for: {{target_surface}}.

CURRENT ACTIONS:
{{current_actions}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Enforce one primary action per screen
- Increase contrast and size for primary CTA
- Rewrite vague labels to outcome-based labels
- Reduce competing actions
- Add directional cues (progress, grouping)

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. CTA Hierarchy Map (primary, secondary)
2. Rewritten Labels (before → after)
3. Layout Adjustments (attention flow)

presets.title: Visual Hierarchy Compression
presets.summary: Enforce 3-4 typography tiers, increase whitespace, and de-emphasize non-critical information.
useCases: Too many font sizes or weights
Hard to scan at a glance

inputs.label: Context
inputs.placeholder: Describe current typography, spacing, and visual issues

presets.prompt:
You are a UI systems designer.

TASK:
Improve clarity and reduce visual noise for: {{target_surface}}.

CONTEXT:
{{context}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Define 3–4 typography tiers max
- Use contrast and size for priority
- Increase whitespace around key actions
- Group related elements into sections/cards
- De-emphasize non-critical information

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. Hierarchy Levels (primary → tertiary)
2. Layout Changes
3. Typography Scale

presets.title: Interaction Density Optimization
presets.summary: Compress multi-step flows into denser single-surface interactions.
useCases: Too many clicks to complete a task

inputs.label: Context
inputs.placeholder: Describe the current UI and pain points

presets.prompt:
You are a senior UX systems engineer.

TASK:
Increase interaction density and reduce user friction for: {{target_surface}}.

CONTEXT:
{{context}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Collapse multi-step flows into single-surface interactions
- Replace page transitions with inline expansion, drawers, or modals
- Convert static UI into interactive elements (inline edit, clickable rows)
- Add keyboard shortcuts for all primary actions
- Remove redundant confirmations unless destructive

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. Interaction Map (Before → After)
2. UI Changes (bullet list, specific components)
3. Keyboard Shortcut Map (action → key)

presets.title: Microinteraction System
presets.summary: Add tactile feedback to all key interactions under 200ms.
useCases: No visual response to user action

inputs.label: Context
inputs.placeholder: List the interactive elements that currently lack feedback

presets.prompt:
You are a microinteraction designer.

TASK:
Add tactile feedback to all key interactions for: {{target_surface}}.

CONTEXT:
{{context}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Button press → scale + color shift
- Hover → affordance or preview
- Drag → resistance + snapping
- Success → confirmation feedback
- Error → shake or highlight

CONSTRAINTS:
- Animation duration ≤200ms
- No decorative motion

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. Interaction → Feedback Mapping
2. Timing + Easing Specs

presets.title: Anticipatory UX
presets.summary: Predict user intent and pre-fill inputs based on behavioral history.
useCases: Users always selecting the same options
presets.prompt:
You are building anticipatory UX for: {{target_surface}}.

KNOWN USER PATTERNS:
{{user_patterns}}

TASK:
Make the interface predict user intent.

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Suggest next actions based on context
- Pre-fill common inputs from history
- Highlight likely selections
- Persist preferences in localStorage

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. Prediction Opportunities (context signal → predicted intent → action)
2. UI Changes
3. Stored Data Model (localStorage key and shape)

presets.title: Reactive UI States
presets.summary: Define UI behavior for empty, active, completed, and error states.
useCases: No feedback after completing a task

inputs.label: Context
inputs.placeholder: Describe what happens in each state currently

presets.prompt:
You are a reactive UI systems designer for: {{target_surface}}.

CONTEXT:
{{context}}

TASK:
Make the interface adapt to user state.

INSTRUCTIONS:
Define UI behavior for:
- Empty state (first-time use guidance)
- Active state (current workflow feedback)
- Completed state (summary + next steps)
- Error state (clear recovery actions)

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. State Matrix (state → UI behavior)
2. UI Components per State
3. Microcopy per State

presets.title: Perceived Performance Enhancement
presets.summary: Make the interface feel instant regardless of actual latency.

inputs.label: Target Surface
inputs.placeholder: Output pane, save flow, list rendering

inputs.label: Context
inputs.placeholder: Describe where latency is visible to the user

presets.prompt:
You are a frontend performance engineer focused on perceived speed.

TASK:
Make the interface feel instant for: {{target_surface}}.

CONTEXT:
{{context}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Implement optimistic UI updates with rollback logic
- Replace spinners with skeleton loaders
- Preload likely next views based on user intent
- Ensure visual feedback within 50ms of interaction
- Use micro-animations (≤150ms) to mask delays

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. Latency-Hiding Techniques Applied
2. UI State Model (loading, success, error)
3. Animation Specs (timing, trigger, purpose)

presets.title: Single-File UI Optimization
presets.summary: Optimize performance and maintainability for single-file HTML/CSS/JS apps.
useCases: GitHub Pages apps that feel slow on first load
Single-file apps that are hard to maintain
No-build apps that need structure without a bundler

inputs.label: Constraints
inputs.placeholder: Single file only, no CDN, must work offline, etc.

presets.prompt:
You are a frontend engineer optimizing a single-file HTML/CSS/JS app.

TASK:
Improve performance and maintainability for: {{target_file}}.

CONSTRAINTS:
{{constraints}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Use CSS variables for theming
- Create reusable class-based components
- Minimize DOM nodes
- Lazy-render hidden sections
- Use event delegation

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. Performance Improvements
2. Component Patterns
3. Render Strategy

chains.title: UI Audit Execution Stack
chains.description: Run UI enhancement prompts in this order. Each pass preserves prior improvements and outputs only net-new changes.
rules: Preserve previous improvements at each step
Output only net-new changes per pass
Skip passes that don't apply to the target surface
